feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Strategy base Monthly PM along with the factory calendar
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We have a requirement to do Strategy base Monthly PM along with the factory calendar

  • PM work order plan date should be the first Monday of each month, hence we configure a factory calendar with special rules (mentioning the dates of the first Monday of each month as a Workday ticked)
  • On the strategy we have 1M, 2M, and 3M packages (Strategy unit = MON)

I expect to get orders on 1-Apr, 6-May, and 3-Jun according to the Factory calendar working days but system calculates the 30 working days from the Factory calendar and proposes a planned date in 2026.

Is there any standard way to generate orders according to the custom factory calendar from a Startagy base PM Plam?

Thanks

entry.title: How to see the package number in sap pm maintenance order list?
entry.content:
I have created a maintenance strategy time based with the packages like daily, weekly, monthly, half yearly, yearly.

Created an equipment task list & mentioned the operations.

Those operations are linked to their respective package number.

A strategy plan is created. The task list is assigned. Then the plan is scheduled.

Now the maintenance orders are getting generated.

There are few orders triggered as i can see through iw38.

The generated order contains a few operations (that is not all operations which i mentioned in the task list. And i know that this is due to the package assignment) but how can I know that which package operations are being shown.

How to see the package number in the maintenance orders list?Where can I view the package numbers other than going into task list?

entry.title: Hello all,Can someone through light on how the scheduled start ,end date and time calculated .
entry.content: Hello all in Sap pm  under the operation tab in Work order schedulde start and end time should be according to the time given in Work center for the assigned capacity,and the schedulde start and end date should be according to the Factory calendar assigned to WC but is not behaving like this.Can someone help me to understand this?

entry.title: In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data?
entry.content:
In plant maintenance, is catalog a master data? Because when we create a catalog a transport request.

For any of the master data created in plant maintenance, we don't get any transport request.

Only for catalog if we create, then we get transport request.

Why?

entry.title: Maintenance plan re-scheluding differences
entry.content:
Hello,

How re-schelude maintenance plan during maintenance cycle, when maintenance cycle/packet has been changed.

Scenario 1 Cycle change from 1 MON -->2MON :Single cycle plan with two maintenance item (ITEM1 and ITEM2), and in this scenario ITEM 1 maintenance order has technically completed and ITEM 2 maintenance order has not technically completed. When is ITEM 2 preventive maintenance on next time?

Scenario 2 Maintenance cycle change in strategy plan for 2 items: strategy plan with two maintenance item. ITEM1 packet changed from 1 MON to 2 MON and ITEM2  maintenance packet changed from 2MON to 4MON. In this scenario ITEM 1 maintenance order has technically completed and ITEM 2 maintenance order has not technically completed. When is ITEM 2 preventive maintenance on next time?

entry.title: Sub-Order in SAP Asset Management Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear,

I am currently working in the implementation of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management at a customer. One of the requests was to be able to create a sub-order for a maintenance order > the main maintenance order cannot be closed if the sub-order is not closed first. The thing is that we only have follow-on orders in this environment > there is no real relationship between the two orders, I can close the main or sub-order without any verification of the upper-lower level.

The sub-order is something very common and used in SAP PM but seems not to be integrated in the Cloud version.

Is there a way to create sub-orders in the Cloud version? Or should I use sub-operations? Even if I use sub-operations, I can close the MAIN operation whenever I want. Maybe I can play with user status and prevent and order from being TECO if the status is still in PCNF...

Thank you already for your help.

PS: nothing related to sub-order has been found in this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/7eeba4563f45cf4fe10000000a44147b.html?q=Manage%20Teams%20and%20Responsibilities

Dany R.

entry.title: Take Photo in Maintenance Apps on Microsoft Surface Go tablet
entry.content:
Hi we are implementing mobile devices for a project and want a seamless experience when creating Maintenance Requests and adding images on the run. With an iPad or Android device when choosing the Upload function it present with 3 options (this is across all browsers inc. Edge)

  • Photo Library
  • Take Photo or Video
  • Choose Files

When on a Microsoft device the Upload function automatically opens the file browser and the user will have to locate an image previously taken or minimise the browser, take a photo then return to the browser, locate image and upload. 

Wondering if anyone has successfully been able to make these options available on a Microsoft device?

Thanks

Higgo

entry.title: PM order: How to hide the tab 'Enhancement' in Operations in IW32?
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is there a way to hide this tab: transaction iw32 -> operations -> Enhancement

I know that there is a user-exit to add/remove this tab on the header level (IWO10018), but i can't find anything to change it on operations level. Do you have any suggestions?

entry.title: Restrict the creation of notification for specific PM order type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For Preventive Maintenance orders, Order is creating without notifications. But users can able to create the notification manually for the preventive maintenance orders also. Is there any standard configuration available to restrict the user from the creation of notification for Preventive maintenance order type only.

I removed the notification field in the field selection of the specific order type. Still create icon is available and user are able to create notification for the Preventive orders by clicking create icon.

entry.title: Is GMPS status mandatory for Work Order settlement if there are no operation confirmations?
entry.content:
Hi,

I read in one of the articles that GMPS status in Work Order does not appear upon upgrading to S/4HANA 2020 onwards from 1909 version.
I recently encountered this scenario having to worked both the 1909 and 2022 versions at two different clients and was surprised to see that all Orders in 1909 version had GMPS status when goods were issued against Order. At other client who moved onto S/4 HANA 2022 version, the GMPS status was not appearing for any Order since their upgrade from 1909. 

My concern: I am not able to settle any order in 2022 version using tcode KO88 for Order against which issuance has been made (Movement Type 261) and its status doesn't have GMPS in it.

Upon running KO88 for same Order it says that "there is nothing to settle or already settled", though i made issuance against same order.

Now my question is whether GMPS status is mandatory for Work Orders to be settled? Also how to get this status?

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?
entry.content:
Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?

Can someone send me link for my one on one mock interview? It would be great if someone replies

entry.title: Send to spool any ty of GOS attachment (ABAP)
entry.content:
Hello guys.

I've been searching for a week in forums for some way to send to spool GOS attachments(xlsx, pdf, txt, jpg) using ABAP code. Nothing works well. 

I have a PM order with some attachments. I need to print these documents at once. 

Any suggests?

entry.title: Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module.
entry.content:
Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module. Can someone tell me where can I find the interview questions & how to prepare for SAP plant maintenace functional consultant interview.

I am involved as a core team member in implementation of SAP S/4 hana plant maintenance module. I have knowledge of SAP PM configuration. Need to attend a mock interview. Please give me tips & tricks for going into SAP world.

entry.title: IW21 new tab at item screen
entry.content:
Dear SCN,

Is it possible to create a new tab at item screen level ?

New fields added to QMFE (append structure)

Thanks.

Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: SAP PM Error-'Status Profile not allowed with Object type' while creating an order
entry.content:
While trying to create a work order using IW31, there is an error which prevents me

 'Status Profile X not allowed with Object type Y'

How do I resolve this? Any configuration change required?

@SAPSupport  @palhota @sumitkumar11273

entry.title: Printout from IW38/IW3D is square box with X inside
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone may help me please. Our user can print fine in IW32 but whenever she tries to print in IW3D or IW38, the printout comes out as boxes with X inside. When I try to print at my end in IW3D or IW38 using the same user ID and Maintenance Orders, it prints correctly. Please help me. Where can I check further? Thank you.

Regards,

LMO

entry.title: Email Notification after Screening Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Dear,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition for Asset Management, there is the following request: in the screening phase, while in the "Screen Maintenance Request" tile, we can accept/reject a maintenance request (Y1) > since there is no existing workflow for notifications, how can we alert (sending an email) the technician to say if a maintenance request has been accepted/rejected? Creating a custom output item?

If there is an existing solution, can you please elaborate?

I have a reference here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-set-up-the-email-notification-for-flexible-workflow-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13524492 but as stipulated, this is for a workflow.

 

Thank you very much,

 

Dany R.

entry.title: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location in SAP PM
entry.content: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location and vice versa in SAP plant maintenance?

entry.title: What is overall equipment effectiveness
entry.content:
What is the meaning of overall equipment effectiveness in sap plant maintenance?

 

How it is useful?

entry.title: What is serialisation in equipment & functional location in SAP pm
entry.content:
What is the meaning of serialisation of equipment & functional location?

Can the serialisation of functional location be done?
